item.title: Van building
item.description: In June 2017 I started converting my van into a mobile home. It took a whole year to finish. In the meantime I quit my job, went traveling in Asia. Spent NYE in Wuhan, China. Worked at a farm on an inhabited island. Swam in the Dead Sea. These are some photos showing the process.

item.title: First steps with Machine Learning
item.description: I have decided to learn machine learning. I will post here once I achieve anything, i.e. create some models, have some graphs to show. Stay tuned.
